# NMAP(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  nmap — network mapper and port scanner

## SYNOPSIS
  nmap [options] <target>

## DESCRIPTION
Discovers hosts, open ports, and running services on the network.

## OPTIONS
  -sV      version detection
  -sS      SYN scan (stealth)
  -p ports port range (e.g. -p 1-1000)
  -A       aggressive scan (OS detect + version)
  -oN file save output to file

## EXAMPLES
  nmap nexus.corp
  nmap -sV 10.0.1.0/24
  nmap -p 8443 chimera-control

## SEE ALSO
  scan, ping, nc, netstat
